title: potentilla × pennina
intro: Potentilla × pennina, also known as Pentalenia, is a hybrid plant species resulting from the cross between Potentilla reptans and Potentilla erecta. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties attributed to its root and leaves, which contain salicylic acid and other compounds with anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Potentilla × pennina include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and support digestive health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to leverage its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to fully understand its effects and optimal usage.
